text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: And so it begins—this year's Spring<n>Fan Fest!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: It's neck-and-neck in the Tracen<n>marathon! Who will be first to the<n>academy gates and past the finish<n>line?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Okay, everyone. Our next cheer is<n>"Fight on!" Let's support the racers<n>with our best cheering voices! Ready,<n>and—

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Fight on!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: First place is in! Followed closely by<n>the pack! And with that, the last racer<n>is firmly past the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Cat-Eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Hehe! King, thank youfor your support! I actually finished!Your cheers helped me keep running!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It wasn't only me cheering. All the<n>fans here cheered for you to make it<n>across the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Congrats! You did it! What an<n>inspiring feat!

text_block_list.name: Cat-Eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...Hehe, you're right. I didn't<n>realize I had so many people cheering<n>me on!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Well, you do. Let that sink in. Now...<n>Cheer Squad, assemble! We're<n>moving on to the next competition!

text_block_list.name: Nature and Pearl
text_block_list.text: Hooray! Hooray! Tracen!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Oh, this year's Fan Fest is a blast as<n>always! Even the people cheering<n>look like they're having lots of fun.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: You're welcome to join! ♪ I can<n>sense you've got cheer spirit! Feel<n>free to shout out anytime!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Uh, uhh... B-but... I don't know the<n>chants or anything...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Not to worry! I'll teach you the chants,<n>and you can just follow along! Let's<n>enjoy ourselves! ♪ C'mon!

text_block_list.name: Pearl and Spectator
text_block_list.text: Oh, Tracen! Tracen! Go!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Hehe, even the cheers sound<n>exciting! Maybe I'll try shouting<n>something!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Please do! I'll give you some<n>lyric cards if you like, so have fun<n>cheering with us right up till the end!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: This year's Fan Fest seems to have<n>loud cheers everywhere you go.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: I know, right? It's got me joining in<n>too!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: (...Everyone watching has a twinkle in<n>their eyes. Wow... King's done a<n>great job with the Cheer Squad!)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: King, I promise...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I will see this race through to the end!<n>No matter how hard it gets... I'll be<n>just like you!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I will give the fans a race to go wild<n>about!

text_block_list.name: Fan Fest Committee
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! All participants of the<n>4,000-meter scavenger hunt obstacle<n>race, we have an important update to<n>share!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: This afternoon, there'll be a lot of<n>events going on at the same time.<n>There's the cycling race by the<n>school gates, and the quiz run in the<n>gym...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I think we'll have no choice but to<n>split up. Can I leave the cycling race<n>with you and Pearl?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Okay. So you'll be at the gym? After<n>that, we have the 4,000-meter<n>scavenger hunt obstacle race, so<n>let's meet at the track.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Kiiing! I picked up some lost property<n>for the Cheer Squad as I was<n>patrolling around!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ah! S-sorry! We've been rushing<n>around all day...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Sounds like you could do with some<n>deep breaths! That's what I did last<n>year. I was told to calm down and<n>take deep breaths!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Nature, we should start heading over<n>soon.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, sorry. Well, we'll be off, then!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Okay, good luck! All right, everyone.<n>Time to split up! Let's go to our<n>respective events and cheer with the<n>fans!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad
text_block_list.text: Osu!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Thank you for lending your wisdom! I<n>hope you'll be watching over us as<n>we cheer!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yup! Heh, look at you, getting more<n>dependable!

text_block_list.name: Disciplinary Committee Member
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, Captain! I found this lost<n>property while I was doing my<n>rounds!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh, this is...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: ...They really have been rushing<n>around, huh. Guess I'll take a little<n>detour. Hm?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hooray! Hooray! Go, Tracen!<n>Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: (Gahhh, this is so embarrassing! But<n>our captain trusted me with this, so I<n>have to at least try and see it through<n>properly!)

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Everyone, between races, don't<n>forget to hydrate and refuel with<n>some sugar! We don't want anyone<n>to faint.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text: This is an announcement from the<n>Fan Fest Committee. Concerning the<n>4,000-meter scavenger hunt obstacle<n>race scheduled for 1:30 p.m...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Isn't that...
